---
name: Feature request / proposal
about: Suggest an option, hook, or behavior change
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

<!-- A concrete situation where the module didn't do what you needed.
     A real site, a real calendar, a real outcome. Not "it would be
     nice if…" — what got in your way? -->

## What you'd want instead

<!-- The behavior change. A new constructor option, a different
     default, a new `data-*` template attribute, a hook, an event. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Did you work around it in user-land? Is there an existing option
     or hook (`transformEvent`, `formatDates`, `cleanLocation`) that
     almost does it? -->

## Scope check

<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md for what fits. New top-level options on the
     `GCal` constructor, new `data-*` template attributes, and any
     change that widens the contract are discussed before any PR. -->
